privileged_info_summary: The task locks the 'Quarter 1' marking period by setting does_grades='N' and does_comments='N' in the OpenSIS database school_years table, while keeping the 'Full Year' period open (does_grades='Y'). The control marking period 'Full Year' has the short code 'FY'. All data is synthetically generated by the task setup script.
